name: Bambi Bambi Bambi
description:
"I gonna block you out of my farm! You never coming back ever again you dirty ole' rodeo trash."

It's beginning to look a lot like..uhhhh

Bambi!

Yeah, since it's that obvious time of the year, you are decorating your house with Bambi!

And the only thing that I mainly wish for, is for you to have a good meal, clean yourself well, and get a good rest, cause you deserve it!

Enjoy!

(Bambi is owned by Rapparep, and Dave and Bambi is formerly owned by MoldyGH and is currently owned by Rapparep.)
creator: Mgm7156
